title: tragacantha semibilocularis
intro: Tragacantha semibilocularis, also known as the lesser burnet or mountain salsify, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable remedy for various health benefits. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Tragacantha semibilocularis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
